channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Non, la batterie de votre voiture électrique n’est pas bonne pour la casse dans 5 ans
item.description: Les batteries équipant les véhicules électriques ont encore des progrès à faire pour atteindre une efficacité optimale. Certains résultats sont néanmoins encourageants. C’est le cas de l’usure des batteries, qui s’est avérée très limitée sur les véhicules modernes.

item.title: French Days 2026 : voici les meilleures promotions sur les montres connectées
item.description: Les montres connectées sont de véritables assistants de votre quotidien, capables de remplacer momentanément votre téléphone. Lors des French Days 2026, les montres connectées sont elles aussi au cœur des promotions. Voici notre sélection des meilleures offres disponibles.

item.title: Limited Time: TurboTax Full Service Coupons This May
item.description: Tax season doesn’t have to be stressful. Score 10% off full service expert on federal tax filings and more exclusive TurboTax discount codes on WIRED.

item.title: Ulta Promo Codes: Up to 50% Off in May
item.description: Shop the latest beauty trends and save big using an Ulta promo code for beauty tech, makeup, and more.

item.title: Top Rover Promo Codes and Referral Deals for May 2026
item.description: Score your Rover promo code for 2026.

item.title: Castlery Promo Code: 15% Off in May 2026
item.description: Refresh your living space for less with these verified Castlery coupons, including free shipping offers and furniture set discounts.

item.title: Skullcandy Discount Code: 30% Off | May 2026
item.description: Save on today’s top Skullcandy Promo Codes for Crusher Evo headphones, 36% off Crusher ANC 2 noise-canceling headphones, and more with amazing deals.

item.title: Shark Promo Code: $100 Off | This May
item.description: Shark makes some seriously powerful vacuums, from handheld vacs to steam mops. Don’t miss $100 off, 10% off, and more limited-time coupons from WIRED.

item.title: My least favorite Dyson innovation has snuck its way into its new cordless vacuum — but this bit of small print might just have restored my enthusiasm
item.description: I have good news and bad news about the all-new Dyson V10 Konical.

item.title: How to show up at work when your life is falling apart
item.description: After devastating loss, showing up can feel impossible. These three strategies can help you get through the workday, one moment at a time. I sat in my car staring at the front door of the community mental health center, questioning if I could walk in. If anyone saw me, they might have assumed I was a patient struggling to face my mental health issues head-on in treatment. But I wasn’t. I was the therapist who was struggling to find the courage to walk in the door....
